title: Cave Born
description: Adds new ores, materials and powerful gear. Mine Bronze in the End, find rare Titanium in the Overworld, and craft Netherite Titanium equipment — the strongest in the game!
body:
# CaveBorn
**CaveBorn** extends Minecraft's progression system with new ores, materials, and equipments.

## New Materials
### Bronze

- Found exclusively in the End dimension
- Full set of tools and armor
- A solid mid-game upgrade
### Titanium

- Extremely rare ore spawning deep in the Overworld
- Requires a Netherite pickaxe to mine
- Used to craft the ultimate gear tier
### Netherite Titanium

- The most powerful equipment in the game
- Fireproof like Netherite
- Twice as durable and strong as standard Netherite gear
Crafted by combining Titanium with Netherite
## World Generation
- Bronze Ore generates naturally in the End
- Titanium Ore spawns rarely in the Overworld (both stone and deepslate variants)
- Giant Hogweed — tall dangerous plants found in the wild
- Weeds that can spread and overtake your farmland if left unchecked

## Features
- Complete tool sets (sword, pickaxe, axe, shovel, hoe)
- Full armor sets with custom textures

## Community
Join our Telegram channel for updates, support and discussion: [t.me/purpirka](https://t.me/purpirka)
